title: Notifications - Master Toggle OFF - Update failed
scenario: No notification pop-up appears when firmware update fails while Notifications master toggle is OFF in App Settings > General > Notifications & Device Alerts
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Navigate to App Settings → General → Notifications & Device Alerts.
3. Set the Notifications master toggle to OFF.
4. Go back to the Home screen and ensure a Poly Bluetooth audio device is connected.
5. Initiate a firmware update (DFU) on the connected device.
6. During the firmware update, turn off the connected Poly device (e.g., press and hold the Power button to power it off) to cause the update to fail.
7. Observe whether any notification appears on the Android device after the firmware update fails.
expected: No notification is displayed on the Android device when the firmware update fails, because the Notifications master toggle is OFF.
